recommendations.title: The Factory
recommendations.overview: An obsessed cop is on the trail of a serial killer prowling the streets of Buffalo, N.Y. but when his teenage daughter disappears, he drops any professional restraint to get the killer.

recommendations.title: The Boys in the Boat
recommendations.overview: The triumphant underdog story of the University of Washington men's rowing team, who stunned the world by competing at the 1936 Berlin Olympics.

recommendations.title: Bring It On: Cheer Or Die
recommendations.overview: When a cheer squad practices their routines on Halloween weekend in an abandoned school, they are picked off one by one by an unknown killer.

recommendations.title: Good Night, and Good Luck.
recommendations.overview: The story of journalist Edward R. Murrow's stand against Senator Joseph McCarthy's anti-communist witch-hunts in the early 1950s.

recommendations.title: Woman in Love
recommendations.overview: An actor's career takes a "Tootsie"-like turn when he lets himself be cast as a woman in a movie.

recommendations.title: Graduation Day
recommendations.overview: After the death of a high school track star during a race, a mysterious killer in a fencing mask begins murdering her friends and teachers.

recommendations.title: The Midnight Sky
recommendations.overview: A lone scientist in the Arctic races to contact a crew of astronauts returning home to a mysterious global catastrophe.

recommendations.title: Ju-on: The Grudge 2
recommendations.overview: When the cast and crew of a paranormal TV reality program decide to shoot in the house of the original Saeki hauntings, a series of strange events unfold at the location.

recommendations.title: The Hills Run Red
recommendations.overview: A group of young horror fans go searching for a film that mysteriously vanished years ago but instead find that the demented killer from the movie is real, and he's thrilled to meet fans who will die gruesomely for his art.

recommendations.title: Satan's Little Helper
recommendations.overview: A naïve young boy unknowingly becomes the pawn of a serial killer.
